## Summary
- what changed
- why it changed

## Linked Issue
- Closes #

## Testing
- tests run
- manual verification performed

## Docs
- source-of-truth docs updated:
  - [ ] `TODO.md`
  - [ ] relevant file in `docs/`
  - [ ] ADR updated or added if needed

## Workflow Checks
- [ ] branch is focused on one main concern
- [ ] PR targets `main`
- [ ] issue is linked
- [ ] docs and code are updated together
- [ ] `@codex review` comment added if Codex GitHub review is enabled

## Notes
- rollout, migration, or follow-up notes
